title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
summary: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.

title: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
summary: The recognition allows regulated firms in Abu Dhabi Global Market to offer services involving Tether Gold as tokenized commodities gain broader adoption.

title: LA’s $1.2 Billion ‘Graffiti Towers’ Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
summary: Oil held a two-day gain as the US and Iran continued hostilities in the Middle East, while Yemen’s Houthi militants threatened to blockade Saudi Arabia’s maritime traffic in the Red Sea.

title: Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
Bitcoin miner Hut 8 has said it signed a second 15-year lease ​worth $9.8 billion for its AI data center.

title: Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn
summary:

Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn 
Metaplanet subsidiary Bitcoin Japan is starting a crypto treasury.

title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

title: Grayscale could take Worldcoin to Wall Street after ETF filing with the SEC
summary: The first exchange-traded fund tied to Worldcoin could soon be headed to U.S. markets, as Grayscale files for a Worldcoin ETF.

title: Kalshi, Polymarket open interest falls 20% as World Cup frenzy winds down
summary: Sports accounted for 80% of both Kalshi and Polymarket's total volumes throughout the weekslong World Cup tournament.

title: US to hit Canada with 50% tariffs on wide range of goods
summary: Washington accuses neighbour of engaging in unfair practices in move that could reignite trade war

title: Warsh’s quiet revolution at the Fed
summary: The new US central bank chief is reluctant to signal future interest rate moves — how will hedge funds react?
